Math.text: list@(X, X ^ Y, X / Y, X, X, X, x, x, x, x)
list@(x, x, x, x)
list@(absolute-value@(a), absolute-value@(a), absolute-value@(X / Y), norm@(a), norm@(a), norm@(X / Y))
list@(evaluated-at@(x, 0, infinity), evaluated-at@(x, 0, infinity), evaluated-at@(x, 0, infinity), evaluated-at@((sum _ (X = 0)) ^ N, 0, infinity), evaluated-at@((sum _ (X = 0)) ^ N, 0, infinity))
list@(order@(x ^ 2), order@(x ^ 2), order@(X / Y), commutator@(A, B), commutator@(A, B), commutator@(A, X / Y), anticommutator@(A, B), poisson-bracket@(A, B))
list@(dot-product, cross-product, cross-product)
list@(gradient, gradient@(Psi), gradient@(Psi + X ^ Y), gradient@(Psi + X ^ Y))
list@(divergence, divergence@(a), divergence@(a + X ^ Y), divergence@(a + X ^ Y))
list@(curl, curl@(a), curl@(a + X ^ Y), curl@(a + X ^ Y))
list@(laplacian, laplacian@(Psi), laplacian@(Psi + X ^ Y), laplacian@(Psi + X ^ Y))
list@(sine@(X / Y), (power@(sine, 2))@(x), sine@(x))
list@(sine@(delimited-[]@(X / Y)), sine@(delimited-[]@(x)) * delimited-[]@(X / Y), (power@(sine, x))@(X / Y), sine@(set@(X / Y)), sine@(delimited-[]@(x)) * set@(X / Y))
list@(exponential@(X ^ Y), logarithm@(X ^ Y), natural-logarithm@(X ^ Y), determinant@(X ^ Y), probability@(X ^ Y))
list@(trace@(rho), trace@(X ^ Y), trace@(rho), rank@(M), error-function@(x), residue@(delimited-[]@(f@(z))))
list@(principal-value@(integral@(f@(z) * differential@(z))), principal-value@(integral@(f@(z) * differential@(z))), real-part@(z), real-part, imaginary-part@(z), imaginary-part)
list@(real-part@(X / Y), real-part@(delimited-[]@(X / Y)), imaginary-part@(X / Y), imaginary-part@(delimited-[]@(X / Y)))

Math.tex: [,\quad],[\quad\mbox{c.c.}\quad],[\mbox{\quad if\quad}],[\mbox{\quad then\quad}],[\mbox{\quad else\quad}],[\mbox{\quad otherwise\quad}],[\mbox{\quad unless\quad}],[\mbox{\quad given\quad}]

[\mbox{\quad using\quad}],[\mbox{\quad assume\quad}],[\mbox{\quad since\quad}],[\mbox{\quad let\quad}],[\mbox{\quad for\quad}],[\mbox{\quad all\quad}],[\mbox{\quad even\quad}],[\mbox{\quad odd\quad}],
Math.text: list@(delimited-[]@([ using ]), delimited-[]@([ assume ]), delimited-[]@([ since ]), delimited-[]@([ let ]), delimited-[]@([ for ]), delimited-[]@([ all ]), delimited-[]@([ even ]), delimited-[]@([ odd ]))
list@(delimited-[]@([ integer ]), delimited-[]@([ and ]), delimited-[]@([ or ]), delimited-[]@([ as ]), delimited-[]@([ in ]))
list@(differential, differential@(x), differential@(x), differential@(x, 3), differential@(cosine@(theta)))
list@(derivative@(absent, absent), (derivative@(absent, absent))@(f), (derivative@(x, absent))@(f), (derivative@(x, n))@(f), (derivative@(x, absent))@(X / Y), (derivative@(x, absent))@(f))

list@(partial-derivative@(absent, absent), (partial-derivative@(absent, absent))@(f), partial-derivative@(absent, absent), (partial-derivative@(x, absent))@(f), (partial-derivative@(x, n))@(f), (partial-derivative@(x, absent))@(X / Y), (partial-derivative@(x, absent))@(f))

list@(variation@(F@(delimited-[]@(g@(x)))), variation@(E - T * S), functional-derivative@(absent, absent), (functional-derivative@(g, absent))@(F), (functional-derivative@(V, absent))@(E - T * S), (functional-derivative@(x, absent))@(F))
(functional-power@(differential, absent))@(delimited-[]@(X / Y))

para.p: And multiple derivatives, sorta; But only for partial:

Math.text: list@((partial-derivative@(x, 1, y, 1))@(f), (partial-derivative@(x, 1, y, 1))@(f) * z, (partial-derivative@(x, 1, y, 1))@(f) * z, (partial-derivative@(y, absent))@(x))
list@((derivative@(x, absent))@(f) * y, (functional-derivative@(f, absent))@(F) * g)
list@(inner-product@(phi, psi), [as opposed to], bra@(phi) * ket@(psi))
list@(bra@(phi) * outer-product@(psi, xi), [as opposed to], inner-product@(phi, psi) * bra@(xi))
list@(ket@(X ^ Y), ket@(X ^ Y), bra@(X ^ Y), bra@(X ^ Y))
list@(inner-product@(phi, psi), inner-product@(phi, X ^ Y), inner-product@(phi, X ^ Y), inner-product@(phi, X ^ Y), inner-product@(phi, X ^ Y))
list@(inner-product@(a, b), inner-product@(a, a), inner-product@(a, X ^ Y), inner-product@(a, X ^ Y))
list@(inner-product@(a, b), outer-product@(a, b), outer-product@(a, a), outer-product@(a, X ^ Y), outer-product@(a, X ^ Y), outer-product@(a, b))

list@(outer-product@(a, b), expectation-value@(A), expectation-value@(A, Psi, Psi), expectation-value@(A, Psi, Psi), expectation-value@(X / Y, Psi, Psi), expectation-value@(X / Y, X ^ Y, X ^ Y), expectation-value@(X / Y, Psi, Psi))
list@(expectation-value@(A, n, m), expectation-value@(A, n, m), expectation-value@(X / Y, n, m), expectation-value@(X / Y, n, X ^ Y), expectation-value@(X / Y, n, m))
matrix@(Array[[matrix@(Array[[1, 0], [0, 1]]), matrix@(Array[[a], [b]])], [matrix@(Array[[c, d]]), e]])
matrix@(Array[[matrix@(Array[[1, 0], [0, 1]]), matrix@(Array[[a], [b]])], [matrix@(Array[[c, d]]), e]])
matrix@(Array[[matrix@(Array[[1, 0], [0, 1]]), matrix@(Array[[x / y], [b]])], [matrix@(Array[[u + v + w + x + y + z, d]]), e]])

Math.tex: \matrixquantity{\lx@physics@matrix a & b \\ c & d\endlx@physics@matrix}\qquad{\matrixquantity(\lx@physics@matrix a & b \\ c & d\endlx@physics@matrix)}\qquad{\matrixquantity(\lx@physics@matrix a & b \\ c & d\endlx@physics@matrix)}\qquad{\matrixquantity[\lx@physics@matrix a & b \\ c & d\endlx@physics@matrix]}\qquad{\matrixquantity|\lx@physics@matrix a & b \\ c & d\endlx@physics@matrix|}\qquad\smallmatrixquantity{\lx@physics@smallmatrix a & b \\ c & d\endlx@physics@smallmatrix}\qquad{\matrixdeterminant{\matrix a & b \\ c & d\endmatrix}}\qquad{\smallmatrixdeterminant{\smallmatrix a & b \\ c & d\endsmallmatrix}}
Math.text: list@(matrix@(Array[[a, b], [c, d]]), matrix@(Array[[a, b], [c, d]]), matrix@(Array[[a, b], [c, d]]), matrix@(Array[[a, b], [c, d]]), matrix@(Array[[a, b], [c, d]]), matrix@(Array[[a, b], [c, d]]), determinant@(matrix@(Array[[a, b], [c, d]])), determinant@(Array[[a, b], [c, d]]))
list@(matrix@(Array[[1, 0], [0, 1]]), matrix@(Array[[0, 1], [1, 0]]), matrix@(Array[[0, - imaginary-unit], [imaginary-unit, 0]]), matrix@(Array[[1, 0], [0, - 1]]))
